retained_observations.retained_reason: P1/P2/P3 left source actions implemented, but the current source patch changed the source tree fingerprint and the matrix still reports release, promotion, artifact-freshness, and supply-chain operator evidence pending for the active report set.
retained_observations.next_action: After committing source changes, rerun release-run-ready, release-sealed-run-ready, release-auto-promotion-ready, and external-report-action-matrix; provide Sigstore bundle evidence only through SIGSTORE_BUNDLE_REF and operator-evidence-closeout-current-or-refresh.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when the action matrix has no release-run, promotion, operator, or artifact-freshness pending actions for the active report set, or when remaining operator-only work is registered under a narrower observation.

retained_observations.retained_reason: The runtime decomposition plan still lists a concrete next-safe move for auto_improve_readiness, but this is an independent maintenance backlog rather than a release-authority or active-report closure blocker.

retained_observations.retained_reason: P1/P2 rebound release and promotion evidence for the prior source fingerprint, P3 confirmed supply-chain external verification remains operator-pending without a bundle, and the current source patch requires release authority readback again.
